license_note: Apache-2.0 (from the official Hugging Face dataset card metadata).
notes: Current smoke materializes the official full story text from the validation split, then converts it into a segment-aware excerpt with question-aware chunk selection plus chronological anchors. This keeps the local smoke runnable while making the NarrativeQA path closer to the paper-critical M_long -> M_short setting than the older summary-only scaffold.
